decision.summary: No new action: only two hours remain in the daily market, the active 77k dip is still alive, and there is no late-session daily or weekly setup with enough edge to justify a new trade.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean. BTC spot is 77525.84 and the short-term Binance bias is neutral, with shorts still dominant but no strong directional expansion. The active daily 77k dip has fallen back to roughly 25%, which is weak but still above the 20% discarded-for-slot threshold, so it remains technically active. At the same time, only two hours remain until daily close, which makes any new same-day entry low quality by the playbook. The only nearby alternatives are 78k reach around 24.5% and the existing 77k dip itself; neither offers a clean enough late-session edge, and the weekly frontier remains poor, with 80k reach only about 6.5% and downside weeklys deeply discounted. There is no take-profit condition, no justified management action, and no fresh opening worth forcing this close to expiry. The disciplined decision is NO_ACTION.
